title: habenaria roxburghii
intro: Habenaria roxburghii, also known as the Roxburgh's orchid or the Himalayan yellow orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region and parts of China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani systems, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Habenaria roxburghii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be administered orally or applied topically to the affected area.
